Determine the precise metro station corresponding to Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF by researching its location relative to nearby metro stops

Provide the final answer as a numerical integer value

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to invoke the search agent. The answer in Step 2 is fabricated.
